T0366.title: Casino Shuttle
T0366.definition: 在赌博黑产中，“窑车”指专门接送赌客往返地下赌场的车辆，是赌场物流环节的一环。
T0366.description: These vehicles are centrally dispatched by the casino, with drivers familiar with routes and surveillance blind spots. They pick up gamblers from meeting points, take them to hidden locations, and return them afterward, all under closed management. The vehicles often use cloned or fake plates and may be equipped with communication jammers to prevent tracking. If compromised, these transport vehicles become a key lead for police to locate the casino's entrance.
